titles.title: Balanced Agricultural Support and Efficiency Act
Balanced Agricultural Support and Efficiency Act
To amend the Agricultural Act of 2014 to require a one-time update of base acres for covered commodities to ensure base acres reflect recent planting history, and for other purposes.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Agriculture.
Referred to the Subcommittee on Commodity Markets, Digital Assets, and Rural Development.

committee.name: House Agriculture
committee.subcommittee: Commodity Markets, Digital Assets, and Rural Development
